name: WfSwap
description: Trades the Main and AUX buses mid-chain, so a second effect group can process the carried signal. It is its own inverse, and bypassing it is an exact no-op. After one swap the tail WfMerge must be Mode SWAP. Original effect by Waveformer.

params.name: SidCh
params.explanation: KEEP leaves the SIDECHAIN bus alone. SWAP re-points it at the signal the swap just brought in.
